'''''Shadow''''' was an [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] in the service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
[[File:Shadow3.jpg|thumb|left|200px|''Shadow'' moves to engage the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] during the [[Battle of Hospital]].]]
It was assigned to the [[Hospital (XQ2 Platform)|Rebel hospital]] as protection for the rebels who were wounded during the evacuation of Hoth. However while [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas Azzameen]], piloting the ''[[Vasudra]]'', was delivering bacta to the Rebels, The [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] and a pair of [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|Lancer-class frigates]], ''[[Cascade]]'' and ''[[Blue Hawk]]'', dropped out of hyperspace and began a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bomber]] bombardment of the hospital. ''Shadow'' then joined in the hasty defense of the station and engaged the ''Corrupter'', helping to buy time for at least two-thirds of the station's personnel and patients to escape.

==Behind the scenes==
''Shadow''{{'s}} fate is unclear, as it is possible for the vessel to escape, or be destroyed, depending on a number of situations made possible by random events in X-wing Alliance's AI, as well as the actions of the player. Adding further ambiguity to the ship's fate is the fact that ''Shadow'' does not appear again later in the XWA campaign, nor does it appear in any other source.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
